summary: Adds a new, previously-nonexistent atomic run-directory reservation helper under .cdr/tools/. No existing product code (engine/, agents/, ui/, api/, proto/) is touched. Blast radius is limited to CDR meta-tooling.
modules_impacted: cdr-tooling (new, not part of engine/agents/ui/api product surface)
backward_compatibility: Additive only. Existing run directories are untouched. Agents that continue to use the old ls-then-mkdir convention are unaffected (no shared state format change) but should migrate to calling the new script per the acceptance criteria.
rollback_plan: Delete .cdr/tools/reserve-run-dir.sh and .cdr/tools/test-reserve-run-dir.sh; no other state is mutated by this change.
concurrency_considerations: The reservation script itself must be race-free under concurrent invocation from multiple independent agent processes/subshells on the same POSIX filesystem (relies on mkdir atomicity, not on any in-process lock, since callers are separate processes).
